creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

This is actually a change request and not a PRoblem record, 
i would suggest that you take this to -hackers (http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-hackers) 
or perhaps even -arch (change hackers into arch for the URL). 
I will leave this suspended for a little to think about this, 
but I don't think anyone will do something with this soon, I 
even think that keeping the console the way it is now is good 
enough. 

Change the status to suspended for the time being.
